label: 棋盘格道路_bsp
description: 使用两级BSP在输入网格的所有非零区域内生成棋盘格道路网络，输出独立的主路掩码、辅路掩码和多值地块网格。
description-en: Generate a chess-town grid road layout using two-level BSP across all non-zero cells of the input grid. Outputs separate grids for main roads, sub-roads, and individually numbered parcels.
icon: 俯视城市路网小图标，粗横竖线为主干道将画面分为几个大块，细线为支路进一步划分出整齐的地块方格，深灰底色配白色道路线，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: inputGrid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 源掩码网格，所有非零单元格均视为可生成道路的区域
inputs.description-en: Source mask grid; any non-zero cell is treated as a valid road-generation area.

inputs.name: mainRoadWidth
inputs.label: 主路宽度
inputs.description: 主干道宽度（单元格数），推荐 2–4
inputs.description-en: Main road thickness in grid cells. Recommended 2–4.

inputs.name: subRoadWidth
inputs.label: 辅路宽度
inputs.description: 支路宽度（单元格数），推荐 1–2
inputs.description-en: Sub-road thickness in grid cells. Recommended 1–2.

inputs.name: mainBlockMinSize
inputs.label: 主块最小尺寸
inputs.description: BSP第一级分割后每个超级块的最小边长（单元格数），控制主路网格的疏密
inputs.description-en: Minimum dimension of a super-block after main-road BSP splits. Controls main road density.

inputs.name: parcelMinSize
inputs.label: 地块最小尺寸
inputs.description: BSP第二级分割后每个地块的最小边长（单元格数），控制地块大小
inputs.description-en: Minimum dimension of a parcel after sub-road BSP splits. Controls parcel size.

inputs.name: splitRatio
inputs.label: 分割比例下限
inputs.description: 每次BSP分割时两侧各占的最小比例（0–0.5），越大分割越均匀，推荐 0.35–0.45
inputs.description-en: Minimum fraction each side takes after a split (0–0.5). Higher = more uniform splits. Recommended 0.35–0.45.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 表示使用当前时间（每次结果不同）
inputs.description-en: Random seed; 0 uses current timestamp for a different result each run.

outputs.name: mainRoad
outputs.label: 主路
outputs.description: 主干道掩码网格：主路单元格 = 1，其余 = 0
outputs.description-en: Main road mask grid: main road cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: subRoad
outputs.label: 辅路
outputs.description: 支路掩码网格：支路单元格 = 1，其余 = 0
outputs.description-en: Sub-road mask grid: sub-road cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: parcels
outputs.label: 地块
outputs.description: 多值地块网格：每个地块分配唯一整数ID（1, 2, 3…），非地块单元格 = 0
outputs.description-en: Multi-value parcel grid: each parcel has a unique integer ID (1, 2, 3…); non-parcel cells = 0.

outputs.name: nameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 地块名称清单：包含每个实际存在地块的 {id, name} 条目
outputs.description-en: Parcel name list: [{id, name}] entries for every parcel that contains at least one cell.
